steps_executed.step: Step 1 — Verify PROP-069 against current audit-narrative-citations.js
steps_executed.finding: Zero drift between PROP-069's described patches and current state of script (PROP-069 authored ~1h before this run).

changes: Stage 1A: removed daily-report.pipeline_status surface + daily-report.recommended_actions[].action surface from SURFACES array
Stage 1C+1D: tinker.report.findings[].description extractor filters severity to {moderate,major,critical,operator_escalation} AND tags entries with _check_claim_shape:true
Stage 1D: added claimShapeFires() function with ENTITY_ID/CLAIM_VERB/SPECIFIC_NUM/SCI_REF/NAMED_LIT regexes
Stage 2: WELL_KNOWN_PATHS table added (16 entries) + resolveWellKnownPath() function inserted before existence check in checkAnchor()

Metrics: paragraphs_total renamed claim_shaped_paragraphs_total; paragraphs_uncited renamed claim_shaped_paragraphs_uncited; added citations_auto_resolved, claim_uncited_rate_pct, citation_resolve_rate_pct
Acceptance gates: added summary.acceptance object with claim_uncited (<=15%), citation_resolve (>=85%), bogus_anchor (<=20 flat), file_missing (<=20 flat)
Stdout: new format 'claim-uncited=N claim-shaped=N citation-resolve=X% bogus-anchor=N file-missing=N auto-resolved=N' plus legacy uncited=N bogus_anchors=N tail for 14-day overlap
steps_executed.edge_cases_preserved: empty prose, triple-backtick code blocks, single-backtick inline code, markdown headers (#), list items (-,*,1.), single-sentence paragraph skip — all unchanged

changes: Replaced MECH3_UNCITED + MECH3_BOGUS variable captures with MECH3_CLAIM_UNCITED + MECH3_RESOLVE_PCT + MECH3_BOGUS + MECH3_FILE_MISSING
Added legacy-key fallback (parses uncited= / bogus_anchors= if new keys read as 0) for 14-day overlap window — drop after
Soft-complaint trip logic: fires on resolve<85% OR bogus>20 OR file-missing>20 (claim-uncited rate enforced inside script)
Output format: 'soft-complaint: narrative-cite claim-uncited=N file-missing=N bogus-anchor=N resolve-rate=X%'
Used awk for float comparison (more portable than bc; the integration tests should still pass on the same Haiku-friendly idiom)
steps_executed.tinker_grep_compat: Tinker's soft-complaints grep targets the literal word 'soft-complaint' in run reports — that token is preserved in the new format, so no grep-pattern update was needed in tinker.md or any reference file.

The follow-up is a BEHAVIORAL PROP for curmudgeon citation discipline (likely PROP-070+ under a future operator-directive). Out of scope for PROP-069 per directive non_goals[0].

findings.title: PROP-069 deployed: narrative-cite recalibration
findings.description: Implemented PROP-069 per DIRECTIVE-20260531-008. Three changes landed: Stage 1 surface targeting filter, Stage 2 CITATION_RE hardening + WELL_KNOWN_PATHS auto-resolution, threshold recalibration to claim-uncited<=15% / citation-resolve>=85% / flat caps of 20 on bogus-anchor and file-missing. Deployment validation: actual 1680 vs projected 1640 claim-uncited (delta +2.4%, within ±25% tolerance). Mechanical caps PASS (17<=20 bogus, 10<=20 file-missing). Auto-resolved 6 bare-filename citations. The claim-uncited rate (97.1%) and citation-resolve rate (54.2%) remain RED versus targets — this is the EXPECTED, ACTIONABLE state per PROP-069 §6.expected_initial_state_post_implementation. The remaining 1,680 uncited concentrate in curmudgeon.reviews (per the 2026-05-31T02:07Z baseline, ~85% of curmudgeon review files have zero citations anywhere). The follow-up is a behavioral PROP for curmudgeon citation discipline, deferred per directive non_goals[0] to a future operator-directive after PROP-069's projected reduction materializes in actual audit runs (it just did this run).

findings.title: Backlog trend healthy
findings.description: PROP-030 backlog-trend metrics computed: open_issues_total=59, open_status_count=12, assigned_analyst_count=35, age_ge_14d=0, age_ge_30d=0, oldest_open_age_days=0.67, new_issues_velocity_7d=59, closed_issues_velocity_7d=133, net_velocity_7d=+74 (positive — healthy), baby_drain_count_7d=1, verify_drain_count_7d=0. No PROP-030 thresholds fire. The queue is being drained faster than it fills, consistent with healthy BAU operation.
